constructors.label: new
docs: Constructor - Initialize empty portfolio

messages.label: get_owner
docs: Get portfolio owner

messages.label: get_state
docs: Get current portfolio state

messages.label: get_deployment_timestamp
docs: Get deployment timestamp

messages.label: get_total_tokens_held
docs: Get total number of tokens held

messages.label: get_held_token_ids
docs: Get list of token IDs currently held

messages.label: is_emergency_paused
docs: Check if portfolio is emergency paused

messages.label: get_fee_config
docs: Get fee configuration

messages.label: get_total_fees_collected
docs: Get total fees collected

messages.label: set_state
docs: Set portfolio state (owner only)

messages.label: emergency_pause
docs: Emergency pause all operations (owner only)

messages.label: resume_operations
docs: Resume operations after emergency pause (owner only)

messages.label: set_fee_config
docs: Update fee configuration (owner only)

messages.label: set_registry_contract
docs: Set registry contract address (owner only)

messages.label: set_token_contract
docs: Set token contract address (owner only)

messages.label: set_dex_contract
docs: Set DEX contract address (owner only)

messages.label: set_oracle_contract
docs: Set oracle contract address (owner only)

messages.label: get_registry_contract
docs: Get contract references

messages.label: add_token_holding
docs: Add a new token holding to the portfolio (owner only)

messages.label: update_token_holding
docs: Update an existing token holding (owner only)

messages.label: remove_token_holding
docs: Remove a token holding from the portfolio (owner only)

messages.label: get_token_holding
docs: Get specific token holding data

messages.label: holds_token
docs: Check if portfolio holds a specific token

messages.label: get_portfolio_composition
docs: Get complete portfolio composition

messages.label: get_token_amount
docs: Get token holding amount only (convenience method)

messages.label: get_token_target_weight
docs: Get token target weight only (convenience method)

messages.label: get_all_holdings
docs: Get all holdings as simple (token_id, amount) pairs

messages.label: get_all_target_weights
docs: Get all target weights as (token_id, weight_bp) pairs

messages.label: get_total_target_weight
docs: Calculate total target weight allocation across all holdings

messages.label: has_holdings
docs: Check if portfolio has any holdings

messages.label: get_portfolio_stats
docs: Get portfolio statistics

messages.label: add_multiple_holdings
docs: Add multiple token holdings in a single transaction (owner only)

messages.label: update_multiple_amounts
docs: Update multiple token amounts in a single transaction (owner only)

messages.label: set_max_tokens
docs: Set maximum tokens limit (owner only)

messages.label: get_max_tokens
docs: Get maximum tokens limit

messages.label: can_add_tokens
docs: Check if portfolio can accept more tokens

messages.label: validate_weight_allocation
docs: Validate portfolio weight allocation is correct

messages.label: get_remaining_weight_capacity
docs: Get remaining weight allocation capacity

messages.label: initialize_base_portfolio_value
docs: Initialize base portfolio value after first tokens are added (owner only)
This sets the immutable baseline for performance tracking

messages.label: calculate_current_index_value
docs: Calculate current index value using the formula:
Index Value = (Current Portfolio Value / Base Portfolio Value) × Base Index Value

messages.label: get_current_index_value
docs: Get current cached index value (fast query)

messages.label: update_index_value
docs: Update cached index value with real-time calculation (owner only)

messages.label: get_index_performance
docs: Get index performance as basis points relative to $100 baseline
Returns: +2500 for +25%, -1500 for -15%, etc.

messages.label: get_realtime_index_performance
docs: Get real-time index performance (recalculates current value)

messages.label: get_index_base_metrics
docs: Get index base metrics for UI display

messages.label: get_index_value_usd
docs: Get index value in USD (converted via DOT/USD oracle)

messages.label: get_realtime_index_value_usd
docs: Get real-time index value in USD

messages.label: is_index_value_stale
docs: Check if index value data is stale (not updated recently)

messages.label: get_index_update_age
docs: Get time since last index update in milliseconds

messages.label: refresh_index_value
docs: Force index recalculation and update (owner only)

messages.label: get_index_summary
docs: Get index performance over time periods (if we had historical data)

messages.label: set_index_tracking
docs: Enable/disable index tracking (owner only)

messages.label: is_index_tracking_enabled
docs: Check if index tracking is enabled

messages.label: emergency_reset_base_value
docs: Emergency reset index base value (owner only - use with extreme caution)

messages.label: get_token_market_data
docs: Get real-time token price from Registry (public method for external use)

messages.label: get_token_holding_value
docs: Get current market value of a specific token holding

messages.label: get_holdings_with_values
docs: Get all holdings with current market values

messages.label: get_rebalancing_targets
docs: Get active tier tokens for rebalancing decisions

messages.label: is_token_in_active_tier
docs: Check if a token is in the active tier

messages.label: validate_holdings_against_registry
docs: Validate portfolio holdings against Registry data

messages.label: get_portfolio_composition_with_market_data
docs: Get portfolio composition with Registry market data

messages.label: get_portfolio_valuation_breakdown
docs: Get detailed portfolio valuation breakdown

messages.label: test_registry_connection
docs: Test Registry connection and data availability
